overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through ancient ornate stone ruins. She traverses a covered courtyard, passes through a large decorated archway into bright sunlight, and emerges onto an overlook with a scenic view of water and distant mountains.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stone courtyard toward the large archway ahead

notable_agents.action: guard standing watch near the archway entrance

entered.detail: ancient stone building facade with intricate geometric carvings and decorative pillars
matching stone structure with carved patterns and architectural details
massive stone archway with ornate carvings serving as the courtyard exit
cobblestone floor with weathered rectangular stones
simple stone seating along the courtyard wall

segments.scene_description: Walking through an ancient stone courtyard with ornate carved architecture on both sides. The character approaches a large decorated archway ahead while a guard stands watch near the entrance, and the cobblestone path leads steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone archway passage with intense backlighting

events.description: intense sunlight creates lens flare as character enters the archway passage
exiting the covered archway into open air with water vista becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the massive stone archway toward the bright light at the exit

notable_agents.action: guard standing to the side of the archway passage observing the area

entered.detail: decorative stone balustrade lining the left side of the passage
matching stone balustrade on the right side with carved details
bright sunlight streaming through the archway creating lens flare effects

segments.scene_description: Passing through the massive stone archway with intense sunlight streaming through, creating a dramatic lens flare. The enclosed passage features stone railings on both sides as the character moves toward the bright exit where water and sky become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open path leading to scenic overlook

events.description: character slows while approaching the stone railing at the overlook edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the open path toward the overlook railing with water views

entered.detail: calm reflective water surface visible beyond the overlook edge
hazy mountains visible across the water in the background
ancient stone columns standing in the water, remnants of old structures
steep rocky cliff face descending toward the water

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open path with panoramic views of water and distant mountains becoming visible. The character approaches a stone railing at the edge of an overlook, passing by rocky cliffs on the left and ancient stone pillars standing in the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic overlook with panoramic water and mountain vista

events.description: character stops at stone railing to observe the scenic view
camera pans right to survey ancient ruins and structures across the water

agents.ego_description: standing still at the overlook railing while surveying the expansive vista

entered.detail: low stone wall with crenellations serving as a safety barrier at the cliff edge
ruined stone structures and buildings visible on the far shore
standalone stone archway standing in the water near the shore

segments.scene_description: Standing at a stone overlook railing surveying the expansive vista of water, distant mountains, and ancient ruins. The character remains stationary while the camera pans to capture the scenic environment, including a standalone stone archway standing in the water and ruined structures on the far shore.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed shadows of an ornate stone courtyard into a vast, sun-drenched coastal vista. It begins by following the character along a cobblestone path flanked by carved architecture toward a large decorated archway guarded by a sentry. As the camera passes through the massive stone portal, the enclosed passage gives way to intense sunlight and dramatic lens flares that signal the transition to the outdoors. The scene then opens into a panoramic landscape where the character walks past rocky cliffs and ancient pillars standing in the water before reaching a stone railing at the edge of an overlook. Finally, the camera pans across the expansive horizon, surveying distant mountains, ruined structures on the far shore, and a standalone stone archway emerging from the water.
